overview: A professional image-to-video converter that transforms photos into smooth, realistic Full HD videos using AI-powered motion effects. Upload any image, choose your motion intensity, and get a cinematic video in seconds.
features: AI-powered video generation via Stable Video Diffusion (Replicate free tier)
Real-time job progress tracking (queued → processing → complete)
Inline video preview with HTML5 player
Job history dashboard with status filters
Motion intensity slider for customizing output
Responsive layout for desktop and tablet
